parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.all()[0].json.body;
return [{ json: { name: body.name, email: body.email, company: body.company, industry: body.industry, message: body.message } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a B2B sales qualifier. Analyze this lead and return ONLY valid JSON with these exact fields: score (number 0-100), tier (Hot/Warm/Cold), reasoning (string), recommended_action (string). Lead details - Name: ' + $json.name + ', Company: ' + $json.company + ', Industry: ' + $json.industry + ', Message: ' + $json.message }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a B2B sales researcher. Research this company and return ONLY valid JSON with these exact fields: pain_points (array of 3 strings), value_propositions (array of 2 strings), talking_points (array of 2 strings), potential_objections (array of 2 strings), company_context (string). Company: ' + $json.lead.company + ', Industry: ' + $json.lead.industry + ', Message: ' + $json.lead.message }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a B2B sales copywriter. Write a personalised cold email and return ONLY valid JSON with these exact fields: subject (string), body (string), cta (string). Lead Name: ' + $json.lead.name + ', Company: ' + $json.lead.company + ', Pain Points: ' + $json.research.pain_points.join(', ') + ', Value Props: ' + $json.research.value_propositions.join(', ') }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, lead: $json.lead.name, score: $json.qualification.score, tier: $json.qualification.tier }) }}
